page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 31.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.88 GB per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single integrated NVIDIA T4 GPU based on the Turing architecture, which includes 16 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, and network connectivity is rated at a baseline bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear division between CPU-bound tasks and GPU-accelerated workloads. Standard CPU and memory benchmarks, such as stress-ng and Geekbench, place the instance in the lower performance tiers, with single-core and multi-core CPU metrics falling in the bottom 25%. However, the integrated NVIDIA T4 GPU excels at machine learning tasks. LLM inference benchmarks show top-tier performance for prompt processing, achieving 8407.18 tokens per second on a small 135M model and 1134.43 tokens per second on a medium 7B model. Text generation speeds are also robust, reaching 33.96 tokens per second on the 7B model.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge offers a balanced entry point for GPU-driven workloads without the high cost overhead of larger multi-GPU configurations. The tradeoff lies in its modest CPU and memory bandwidth performance, which limits its suitability for heavy general-purpose compute or high-throughput database operations. This instance is best suited for light to medium AI inference, machine learning model deployment, video transcoding, and low-concurrency GPU-accelerated applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, 31.0 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage and provides a 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While standard CPU and memory benchmarks place the instance in the lower performance tiers, its GPU capabilities deliver strong results in machine learning tasks. Specifically, it achieves top-tier prompt processing speeds of 1134.43 tokens per second on a 7B LLM. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for cost-effective AI inference, low-concurrency machine learning deployments, and GPU-accelerated video processing, though it is less optimal for CPU-heavy general-purpose workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 31 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM, optimized for machine learning inference and video transcoding.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 8 vCPUs, 31 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA T4 GPU, designed for AI inference workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring an NVIDIA T4 GPU and dedicated Intel Xeon processors for efficient machine learning inference.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs at 2.5 GHz
1x NVIDIA T4 GPU with 16 GB VRAM
31.0 GB system memory (3.88 GB per core)
Top-tier prompt processing performance for 7B LLM inference
5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Best suited for AI inference, machine learning, and video transcoding
